codepaths.name: Install a plugin from wild-horses
codepaths.summary: User runs /plugin install <name>@wild-horses; Claude Code reads the marketplace catalog and loads the plugin.

steps.annotation: User runs `/plugin install pyright@wild-horses` in their Claude Code session.
Claude Code reads `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` to resolve the plugin entry.
Catalog points at `./plugins/pyright/` — manifest is read and skills/commands registered.
The plugin exposes the `run-and-fix` skill, which now shows up in the slash menu as `/pyright:run-and-fix`.

codepaths.name: Run task-list-runner against a plan
codepaths.summary: User asks Claude to drive a task list; runner dispatches each task and persists state through task_list_cli.py.

steps.annotation: User says 'run the plan' or '/task-list-runner' in their session.
Claude Code resolves the request to the `refactor` plugin's task-list-runner skill.
Skill loads SKILL.md and begins the runner loop.
Runner calls `task_list_cli.py next` to claim a task, then `verify` / `finish` after the agent reports back.
CLI returns the task JSON over stdout (atomic stdin/`os.replace` discipline keeps state safe across iterations).

codepaths.name: Build a task list from a plan
codepaths.summary: User has a free-form spec; task-list-builder converts it into the harness task-list schema via task_list_cli.py.

steps.annotation: User says 'build the task list' against a spec or report.
Claude Code resolves to refactor's task-list-builder skill.
Skill reads its SKILL.md instructions and the linked task-list-schema.md.
Builder validates and writes the JSON file using the same CLI the runner consumes — single source of truth for schema.

codepaths.name: Map codepaths in a target repo
codepaths.summary: User invokes /codepath-mapper; the skill proposes an architecture and codepaths, persists via codepaths_cli.py, and renders HTML.

steps.annotation: User runs `/codepath-mapper` from the target repo (or names a slice).
Claude Code dispatches into the codepath-visualizer plugin.
Plugin loads the codepath-mapper SKILL.md; the agent scans the repo and drafts architecture + codepaths.
Skill writes via `codepaths_cli.py set-architecture --json -` and `add-codepath --json -`, then `render`.
`render` bakes JSON into `architecture.html`; the visualizer skill opens it locally in the user's browser.

codepaths.name: Visualize architecture and select a codepath
codepaths.summary: User invokes /codepath-visualizer --select; the skill spins up a local server, the user clicks a codepath, and the merged JSON is dispatched back to the agent.

steps.annotation: User runs `/codepath-visualizer --select` to surface the picker UI.
Claude Code resolves to the visualizer plugin.
Plugin loads the codepath-visualizer SKILL.md and invokes the CLI in select mode.
`codepaths_cli.py select` binds an ephemeral 127.0.0.1 port and waits on `/pick`.
Opens `architecture.html?select=true&port=N`; user clicks a codepath card and the page POSTs `{id}` back.
Merged JSON `{codepath, components}` is printed to stdout; the skill hands it to the calling agent for follow-up work.
